report.summary: First cycle of Mar 29 (Sunday). BTC ~$66,200-$66,700 (slight uptick from $66K flat). ETH recovers above $2K to ~$2,024. F&G improves to 25 from 12-13 (still Fear, but streak may be broken). DELTA: Uncommitted files 378→389 (+11). Published slugs 598→602 (+4). No deploys — now Day 4 stale. Yesterday ran 56 agent cycles across all 6 agents. Today: standup only so far.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,200–$66,700 (slight uptick from $66,008 in v11). Holding $66K support. Down ~24% YTD, ~48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). Iran geopolitical tensions + oil >$100 remain primary headwinds. Whale accumulation continues — exchange reserves at 7-year lows.
ETH: ~$2,024 (recovered above $2K from $1,985 in v11). ETH/BTC ratio still depressed ~0.030. 24h volume $3.78B. Trading range for the week: $1,950–$2,120.

F&G INDEX: 25 (Fear) — significant improvement from 12-13 in v11. The 46-50 day Extreme Fear streak may be breaking as index climbs out of single digits. Still bearish but sentiment thawing after $8.7B options expiry cleared. Morgan Stanley ETF at 0.14% fee providing institutional tailwind.

DELTA FROM v11 (overnight): BTC +$200-700 (slight uptick). ETH +$40 (back above $2K). F&G 12-13→25 (meaningful sentiment shift). Uncommitted files 378→389 (+11 overnight drift). Published slugs 598→602 (+4). HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). No deploys — now entering Day 4 stale.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: NEW DAY — FIRST CYCLE OF MARCH 29 (SUNDAY). Yesterday (Mar 28) ran 56 total agent cycles: standup×11, build×9, publish×6, design×9, community×10, eod×11. Most productive day yet by run count.

CARRY-OVER FROM YESTERDAY: (1) DEPLOY CRITICAL — 389 uncommitted files spanning 4 days. HEAD at 21aaf5b since Mar 25. Every hour without deploy = lost indexing time for 602 published pages. (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items still blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) Stablecoin Yield Tracker needs server/client split. (4) ~105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (5) 146+ TS errors in 6 files (non-blocking). (6) 17 duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES.

WHAT SHIPPED YESTERDAY (FULL DAY SUMMARY): 22+ new pages built across 9 build cycles. 28+ OG images created. 236+ tweets drafted. 39 newsletter versions. 53+ SVG social cards. Interactive tools: Token Security Scanner, Stablecoin Yield Tracker. Key content: Tariffs & Trade Wars Crypto Impact Guide. UX fixes on multiple pages. 2 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
GIT STATUS: 389 files pending (up from 378). All changes additive. No conflicts expected.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [DAY 4, CRITICAL]: 389 uncommitted files. 602 published slugs. 22+ pages built yesterday invisible to Google. The F&G sentiment shift to 25 from 12-13 means markets may be turning — time-sensitive bear market content (50-day fear record, tariffs guide, options expiry) loses relevance with every hour. Jefe: `rm .git/index.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push`. 5-minute action, highest leverage.
PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR BLOCKED QUEUE: Fix crypto-wallet-security slug mismatch and restaking missing page.tsx. Empties PUBLISH_QUEUE to zero. Quick win for next build cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — RIDE THE SENTIMENT SHIFT: F&G jumping from 12→25 is the first meaningful upward move in 50 days. Content angle: 'Is the Extreme Fear streak over?' — draft analysis piece. Community tweets should pivot from bear-market-survival to cautious-optimism. ETH above $2K again provides hook for engagement.
